name: Event-Driven Agent
description: Event-driven reactive agent triggered by S3 uploads, schedules, or webhooks. Demonstrates agents that respond to the world rather than waiting for user input.

resources.name: AgentCore Runtime
resources.description: Managed container runtime for the event-driven agent

resources.name: IAM Role + 6 Policies
resources.description: Bedrock invoke, ECR pull, S3 read, CloudWatch logs, CloudWatch metrics, X-Ray tracing

pattern_description: Event-driven reactive agent. Triggered by events (S3 uploads, schedules, webhooks) rather than user chat messages. The agent classifies the event, processes it, and stores results. Use this for automation workflows where agents respond to system events.

parameters.name: container_image_uri
parameters.description: ECR image URI for the agent container

parameters.name: event_bucket_name
parameters.description: S3 bucket name for reading event source objects
